creator: godevilove@ya.ru
text:
(In reply to Joe Marcus Clarke from comment #1)
Thanks for the link, I hadn't seen it.
Well, looks like from their position it's ICQ's fault, not pidgin's.
I'm not sure if it is really so, since that wouldd affect users of other ICQ clients as well, which is not the case, as it seems.
However, since that's the pidgin developers position on the issue - feel free to close this one.
